payloads.text:
Let me convert that into a user-friendly message:

Good morning! I tried to prepare your daily status report, but I currently can't access your email inbox or calendar. To provide this summary, I'd need to be connected to your email account (via IMAP or API) and your calendar service.

If you'd like me to start providing these daily summaries, I can guide you through setting up these connections. Just let me know!
